## What do you want?

A clear description of the feature or new component you'd like.

## Why is it needed?

What problem does it solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed API (if applicable)

```html
<!-- Example usage -->
<zyra-component [input]="value" (output)="handler()"> Content </zyra-component>
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or references to similar implementations.
